_meta: NEXUS 3-node live health log, 2026-07-16. Sampled via Supabase MCP from the main loop (sandbox bash/curl is 403-blocked from supabase.co by the agent proxy, so curl-based logging is impossible here). age_s = seconds since that node's last heartbeat at server_now. Nodes: N6PACMM=home rig/Clippy, OQ8SROU=Trajan laptop, SL5ETE7=Providencia laptop.

note: N6PACMM heartbeat 122s stale (long synchronous claude job likely blocked its heartbeat thread); laptops fresh

_summary: 4 samples over ~3min. LIVENESS: all 3 nodes online & heartbeating the whole window; self-update converged (all code=b20279da, all worker-2.1 — earlier drift was transient mid-propagation). CLAUDE: home rig N6PACMM steadily claude=true; BOTH laptops (OQ8SROU Trajan, SL5ETE7 Providencia) steadily claude=false the entire window -> the subscription Claude lane rides on the home rig alone. CMD: OQ8SROU steadily cmd=false (no CMD_TOKEN). txt_lane empty (no stuck jobs). WATCH: N6PACMM had a ~122s heartbeat gap at sample 4 (only Claude node — a heartbeat stall there costs the pool its Claude).
